MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-08-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. DAVID ROSENBERG-WOHL, Esq. of Hershenson Rosenberg-Wohl (tel: 415-317-7756) for Plaintiffs.
Atty. GENE KASKIW, Esq. of Worthe Hanson & Worthe (tel: 714-285-9600) for Defendant American Airlines, Inc.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Matter discussed as to Plaintiffs' intention to file an amended complaint. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court takes the matter off calendar. Plaintiffs are to file a first amended complaint within 10 days.

Counsel David Rosenberg-Wohl is to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2024 Continued To Sep-25-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-06-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance via CourtCall:
Gene Kaskiw, Esq., Tel. 714.285.9600, appearing for defendant American Airlines;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Hearing re: DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Mr. Kaskiw appears to inform the Court that they received a stipulation from plaintiff to voluntarily dismiss this matter which should be forthcoming.

Comments by Mr. Kaskiw conclude, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Off calendar. The Kaskiw declaration does not state whether the parties met and conferred in person, by telephone, or by video conference, as required by CCP 430.31. Responsive pleadings are now due by July 5, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Malone. Matter not reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-06-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance via Zoom:
Gene Kaskiw, Esq., Tel. 714.285.9600, appearing for defendant American Airlines;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Hearing re: DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Mr. Kaskiw appears to inform the Court that they received a stipulation from plaintiff to voluntarily dismiss this matter and that the stipulation should be forthcoming.

Comments by Mr. Kaskiw conclude, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Off calendar. The Kaskiw declaration does not state whether the parties met and conferred in person, by telephone, or by video conference, as required by CCP 435.5. Responsive pleadings are now due by July 5, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Malone. Matter not reported. (302/RBU)
